title: AdaMAST adamast.json configuration
description: Dependency-free JSON configuration file used by AdaMAST CLIs. Explicit CLI arguments override config-file values.

version.description: Configuration schema version. AdaMAST currently supports only version 1.

trace_output.description: Mandatory program/task-specific folder for fallback trace storage.

store_dir.description: Directory containing one taxonomy JSON file per taxonomy_id.

trace_root.description: Root directory for persistent taxonomy trace collections.

repo_path.description: Repository path used for display metadata and repo discovery.

project_dir.description: Harness project directory, used by adapter installation commands.

evidence_export.description: Optional external evidence export path. A .json value is an exact file; any other value is treated as a directory sink.

max_retries.description: Legacy shared retry knob. Maps to repair_rounds when repair_rounds is not set explicitly.

format_retries.description: Budget for reflection parse/shape/consistency failures per checkpoint cycle before the gate releases.

repair_rounds.description: Budget for substantive REPAIR_REQUIRED repair cycles per session gate. Overrides max_retries.

generation_threshold.description: Number of warm-up traces required before initial taxonomy generation.

k_init.description: Program-specific trace count before the first refinement round for a taxonomy.

k.description: Program-specific trace count between later refinement rounds.

failure_throttle_calls.description: Call-count throttle window for repeated hook failure prompts.

failure_recency_seconds.description: Time-based throttle window for repeated hook failure prompts.

generation_stops.description: If true, block the current task while initial taxonomy generation is running.

skip_judge.description: If true, skip the post-generation taxonomy acceptance judge.

refinement_stops.description: If true, block the current task while refinement is running.

advanced_refinement.description: If true, run the optional support-judge recheck/repair loop after proposing a refined taxonomy.

dashboard.description: If true, enable dashboard launch/attachment for supported runtime paths.

freeze.description: If true, inference-only mode records traces/evidence but skips generation and refinement.

redact_traces.description: If true (default), first-party adapters redact credential-looking substrings from traces before persistence.

adamast_model.description: Model used by AdaMAST generation, judging, and refinement. Separate from the user's task model.

inherit.description: Taxonomy inheritance selector: taxonomy_id, omitted/null for interactive/default behavior, or string 'none' to normalize to none.

repo.description: Display-only repository label stored with generated taxonomies.

openai_base_url.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible API base URL for AdaMAST model calls.

openai_api_key_env.description: Environment variable name containing the API key. Do not store plaintext credentials in adamast.json.

model.description: User task-model setting consumed by adapters that run the task agent.

gate_exhaustion_policy.description: Single-LLM behavior when the final gate still blocks after retries.

recent_activity_messages.description: Single-LLM maximum number of recent messages included in checkpoint/final-gate reflection prompts.

recent_activity_chars.description: Single-LLM maximum characters included in recent_activity.

built_in_hooks.description: Legacy top-level Claude Code built-in hook configuration. Prefer claude_code.built_in_hooks.

custom_hooks.description: Legacy top-level Claude Code custom hooks. Prefer claude_code.custom_hooks.

codex_hooks.description: Legacy top-level Codex hook configuration. Prefer codex.hooks.

project_scope.description: Use trace_output directly or derive one program per project.

project_id.description: Optional stable project identity override for auto scope.

session_selector.description: Whether a new Claude Code conversation asks the user to select its taxonomy.

learning_backend.description: Taxonomy learning transport. claude_subagent reuses local Claude Code authentication.

worker_model.description: Optional model override for the isolated Claude taxonomy worker.

claude_cli_path.description: Optional explicit Claude Code CLI executable path.

worker_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum runtime for one isolated Claude taxonomy worker.

custom_hooks.description: Claude Code custom hooks bound to AdaMAST reflection/advisory behavior.

project_scope.description: Use trace_output directly or derive one program per project.

project_id.description: Optional stable project identity override for auto scope.

session_selector.description: Whether a new Codex conversation explicitly asks the user to select its taxonomy.

learning_backend.description: Taxonomy learning transport for Codex conversations. codex_subagent reuses local Codex authentication and requires no external API key.

worker_model.description: Optional model override for the isolated Codex taxonomy worker.

codex_cli_path.description: Optional explicit Codex CLI executable path; normally discovered from CODEX_CLI_PATH.

worker_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum runtime for one isolated Codex taxonomy worker.
